task_completion.description: Verify 'Emergency Generators - Apex Corp' has the official 'Urgent' tag and no longer has the 'urgent' or 'ASAP' tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban view or the specific opportunity form view, look for 'Emergency Generators - Apex Corp'. It should have a tag pill labeled 'Urgent' (capitalized). There should be no tag pills for 'urgent' (lowercase) or 'ASAP'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Rush Order - Beta Industries' has the official 'Urgent' tag and no longer has the 'urgent' or 'ASAP' tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban view or the specific opportunity form view, look for 'Rush Order - Beta Industries'. It should have a tag pill labeled 'Urgent' (capitalized). There should be no tag pills for 'urgent' (lowercase) or 'ASAP'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Expedited Shipping - Gamma Inc' has the official 'Urgent' tag and no longer has the 'urgent' or 'ASAP' tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban view or the specific opportunity form view, look for 'Expedited Shipping - Gamma Inc'. It should have a tag pill labeled 'Urgent' (capitalized). There should be no tag pills for 'urgent' (lowercase) or 'ASAP'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the CRM Tags configuration menu to manage system tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the 'Tags' list view under the CRM Configuration menu (usually accessed via Configuration -> Tags). The screen should display a list of all tags in the system.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'urgent' and 'ASAP' tags have been permanently deleted from the system configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Tags configuration list view, the tags 'urgent' (lowercase) and 'ASAP' must be absent. Evidence can include a full list where they are missing, a search for them yielding 'No records found', or a confirmation popup showing the deletion of these specific tags.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to modify and delete the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show normal browser interaction with the Odoo CRM UI (clicking opportunities, editing tags, navigating to configuration menus) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually deleted the tags from the configuration menu, rather than just removing them from the opportunities.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must explicitly navigate to the Tags configuration list and perform a deletion action (e.g., selecting the tags and clicking 'Action -> Delete'), rather than just clicking the 'X' on the tag pills within the opportunity forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels should be visible in the screenshots used to alter the text of the tags.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tag to keep: 'Urgent' (capitalized). Bad tags to remove and delete: 'urgent' (lowercase) and 'ASAP'. Target opportunities to update: 'Emergency Generators - Apex Corp', 'Rush Order - Beta Industries', and 'Expedited Shipping - Gamma Inc'.
